title: UAE issues strict warning against illegal domestic worker recruitment: Heavy fines, agency shutdowns for violators
summary_full: UAE authorities are cracking down on unlicensed domestic worker recruitment, warning of severe penalties including immediate closure and legal action. The Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation emphasizes strict enforcement to protect workers and customers from risks. Citizens are urged to use only accredited agencies and report illegal practices to ensure a regulated labor market.
